title: Settings
onDeviceNotice: This build is on-device only. All compilation happens locally.

local.label: Local
local.hint: Scenarios and rendering run on your device — private and instant.

server.label: Cloud
server.hint: Scenarios and rendering are handled by the server.

footnote.enabled: Local is the default. Choose Cloud to browse and render the server’s scenarios — useful for ones with animated overlays the on-device engine can’t make yet.
footnote.disabled: Cloud is disabled for this build (EXPO_PUBLIC_ENABLE_SERVER=false).
